pageContext.name: Captain America #19 (Standard Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: I'm with you 'til the end of the line.   Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Captain America #19 (Standard Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Gathering decades of looks, suits, & styles, collage master Mr. Garcin gives us an in-depth look into Marvel's ever-evolving history of its legendary characters. This time we see the stunning work he does for one of Marvel's most iconic Superheroes, Captain America! These collages take our favorite heroes and anti-heroes from decades of the Marvel Universe comic pages and piece them together, and as we see here, making for the ultimate Captain America artwork any fan would love to own!  Be sure to add this dynamic and vibrant Captain America print to your Marvel gallery today!
